pre_freeze_composition.note: CORRECTED 2026-07-19: initial marker wrongly asserted all-operator without verification.

rule: EXTERNAL = an account whose created_at > frozen_at AND whose id is NOT in the committed pre-freeze set. This makes the FIRST POST-FREEZE sign-in provably external. It does NOT retroactively classify the 4 unclassified pre-freeze accounts — that is a separate open question, not asserted here.
caveat: A website sign-up is an external USER, which is distinct from a second independent OPERATOR (the N_eff=2 gate). Do not conflate.
